claims.statement: LNC, LEM, DN hold in {0,1} by COMPLETE enumeration (every value tested)
Same laws DISPROVED in {0,1/2,1} by one counterexample (LNC,LEM fail at 1/2; DN holds; fixed point = 1/2)
d/dx[x^2 sin x] by AND load rule matches analytic to <1e-10 (err=0.0e+00)
Within stipulated O (node-welfare): HARM is strictly dominated at every horizon AND never recoups (monotone non-increasing O)
FALSIFIER EXHIBITED: under O'=order-stability, suppression is NOT dominated (O' rises). Domination is O-relative -> tier is CONDITIONAL-on-O, never FORCED-period
O = the good is a STIPULATION. No code closes is->ought. Declared, not derived
§2 DOWN-TIERED: 'predatory-O self-deletes' is FALSE for a persisting regime (12/12 nodes survive 200 steps). O's non-arbitrariness is CONDITIONAL, not shown
Weakest-link holds and the guide reports its OWN composite tier = STIPULATED (safety FORCED-within-O, but O stipulated -> the guide is a map, not a theorem)
Chain of 5 sealed sections replays intact; mutating one section breaks replay at that link
Not claimed: that this raises model performance — no benchmark is run
Not claimed: that domination => objective immorality. The is-ought gap is compressed to one axiom (O), not closed
Not claimed: that the door/detection is infallible — a staffed gate, not an oracle
Not claimed: that this is an Anthropic-canonical artifact — provenance is community
